configInfo.name: res_ari
configInfo.synopsis: HTTP binding for the Stasis API

configOption.name: enabled
configOption.synopsis: Enable/disable the ARI module

description.para: This option enables or disables the ARI module.

note.para: ARI uses Asterisk's HTTP server, which must also be enabled in http.conf.

configOption.name: websocket_write_timeout
configOption.synopsis: The timeout (in milliseconds) to set on WebSocket connections.

description.para: If a websocket connection accepts input slowly, the timeout for writes to it can be increased to keep it from being disconnected. Value is in milliseconds.

configOption.name: pretty
configOption.synopsis: Responses from ARI are formatted to be human readable

configOption.name: auth_realm
configOption.synopsis: Realm to use for authentication. Defaults to Asterisk REST Interface.

configOption.name: allowed_origins
configOption.synopsis: Comma separated list of allowed origins, for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing. May be set to * to allow all origins.

configOption.name: channelvars
configOption.synopsis: Comma separated list of channel variables to display in channel json.

configOption.name: type
configOption.synopsis: Define this configuration section as a user.

enum.name: user
enum.para: Configure this section as a user

configOption.name: read_only
configOption.synopsis: When set to yes, user is only authorized for read-only requests

configOption.name: password
configOption.synopsis: Crypted or plaintext password (see password_format)

configOption.name: password_format
configOption.synopsis: password_format may be set to plain (the default) or crypt. When set to crypt, crypt(3) is used to validate the password. A crypted password can be generated using mkpasswd -m sha-512. When set to plain, the password is in plaintext

configOption.name: type
configOption.synopsis: Must be "outbound_websocket".

configOption.name: uri
configOption.synopsis: Full URI to remote server.

configOption.name: protocols
configOption.synopsis: Comma separated list of protocols acceptable to the server.

configOption.name: apps
configOption.synopsis: Comma separated list of stasis applications that will use this websocket.

configOption.name: username
configOption.synopsis: Server authentication username if required.

configOption.name: password
configOption.synopsis: Server authentication password if required.

configOption.name: local_ari_user
configOption.synopsis: The local ARI user to act as.

configOption.name: connection_type
configOption.synopsis: Single persistent connection or per-call configuration.

enum.name: persistent
enum.para: Single persistent connection for all calls.

enum.name: per_call_config
enum.para: New connection for each call to the Stasis() dialplan app.

configOption.name: subscribe_all
configOption.synopsis: Subscribe applications to all event

configOption.name: connection_timeout
configOption.synopsis: Connection timeout (ms).

configOption.name: reconnect_attempts
configOption.synopsis: On failure, how many times should reconnection be attempted or logged?

description.para: For per_call connections, this is the number of (re)connection attempts to make before returning an and terminating the call. Persistent connections always retry forever but this setting will control how often failure messages are logged.

configOption.name: reconnect_interval
configOption.synopsis: How often should reconnection be attempted (ms)?

configOption.name: tls_enabled
configOption.synopsis: Enable TLS

configOption.name: ca_list_file
configOption.synopsis: File containing the server's CA certificate. (optional)

configOption.name: ca_list_path
configOption.synopsis: Path to a directory containing one or more hashed CA certificates. (optional)

configOption.name: cert_file
configOption.synopsis: File containing a client certificate. (optional)

configOption.name: priv_key_file
configOption.synopsis: File containing the client's private key. (optional)

configOption.name: verify_server_cert
configOption.synopsis: If set to true, verify the server's certificate. (optional)

configOption.name: verify_server_hostname
configOption.synopsis: If set to true, verify that the server's hostname matches the common name in it's certificate. (optional)
